options.C: (D) Q.20 Let 𝑋 and 𝑌 be two random variables with cumulative distribution functions 𝐹𝑋(⋅) and 𝐹𝑌(⋅), respectively. Then which one of the following statements is NOT true?
options.B: There exist 𝑋 and 𝑌 such that 𝐹𝑋(𝑢) = 𝐹𝑌(𝑢) for all 𝑢∈ℝ, and 𝑃(𝑋= 𝑌) = 0
